nation: Mississaugas of the Credit First Nation
one_time_description: Remeasurement gain on change in accounting policy for portfolio investments upon adoption of PS 3450 Financial Instruments effective April 1, 2022
economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of 8392692 Canada Inc., 100% of Nanticoke Corporation (Nanticoke Solar LP), 100% of MCBC (Mississaugas of the Credit Business Corporation), and 99.99% of MCB-LP (Mississaugas of the Credit Business LP). New Credit Variety and Gas Bar consolidated directly. Business enterprises segment revenue $17,921,204.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated financials include New Credit Variety and Gas Bar. Four GBEs (8392692 Canada Inc., MCBC, MCB-LP, Nanticoke Solar LP) accounted for under modified equity method. Toronto Purchase Trust and Community Trust not consolidated. Adoption of PS 3450 Financial Instruments, PS 1201, PS 3041, and PS 3280 effective April 1, 2022 resulted in a $3,022,385 remeasurement gain on opening portfolio investments. Balance sheet detail (current liabilities, deferred revenue breakdown, long-term debt balance, tangible capital assets net book value) not fully extracted from provided text. total_government_transfers calculated as sum of ISC + Health Canada + CMHC + ALFDC + MCCSS + Ministry of Education + Ministry of Health + Ministry of Transportation + FedDev Ontario. OSR includes Toronto Purchase Trust, Community Trust, business enterprise sales, portfolio income, GBE equity income, other income, deferred revenue movements.
